title: AWeber vs Privy (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: AWeber vs Privy: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between AWeber and Privy comes down to your specific use case. AWeber is built for bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity, while Privy targets Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

comparison_table.tool_b: Shopify Stores Wanting Email, Sms, And Popups In One Tool

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool

faq.a: It depends on your use case. AWeber wins for bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity, while Privy is stronger for Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, AWeber or Privy?
faq.a: AWeber starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Privy to AWeber?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
